overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking along a sunlit dystopian urban sidewalk past a pink graffiti-covered industrial building, then entering a dark covered walkway beneath a massive concrete parking structure. The environment features urban decay with extensive graffiti, overgrown vegetation, burning barrels, and makeshift tent encampments.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside graffiti-covered industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sunlit sidewalk, passing pink industrial building with large graffiti reading WORSHIP THE NEW

notable_agents.action: small figure standing near the graffiti building in the distance

entered.detail: pink industrial building with large black graffiti reading WORSHIP THE NEW
multi-level concrete parking garage with weathered facade and metal railings
tall palm trees visible against blue sky in the distance
metal guardrail running along the left edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunlit urban sidewalk in a dystopian city. To the left stands a distinctive pink industrial building covered in black graffiti, while a massive concrete parking structure looms on the right. The camera moves forward steadily, passing overgrown weeds and metal railings, with palm trees visible in the distance against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath concrete overpass

events.description: entering dark covered walkway beneath the concrete parking structure, sky disappears from view
passing a burning barrel emitting orange flames, providing warm illumination in the darkness

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit concrete corridor with exposed ceiling beams and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: exposed concrete support beams forming the ceiling of the covered walkway
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
metal barrel with open fire burning inside, providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a dark, enclosed walkway beneath the concrete structure. Natural light disappears, replaced by dim ambient lighting and the warm glow of a burning barrel. The walls are covered in graffiti, and the ceiling shows exposed concrete beams. The path continues straight ahead toward a distant bright exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional overpass area with homeless encampment

events.description: approaching bright tunnel exit, natural sunlight flooding in from the end of the corridor
passing colorful camping tents and makeshift shelter set up along the walkway wall

agents.ego_description: approaching tunnel exit while passing homeless encampment with tents and scattered belongings

notable_agents.action: person standing near the tents looking out toward the street

entered.detail: colorful tents and makeshift camping setup with tarps and belongings
bright opening at the end of the tunnel leading back outside
dark smoke rising from buildings visible in the distance outside

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the exit from the covered walkway, with bright sunlight streaming in from ahead. Colorful camping tents line the left wall, indicating a homeless encampment. An NPC stands near the railing looking out at the street where palm trees and distant smoke are visible. The camera moves toward the bright exit, transitioning from the dark tunnel back to the sunlit urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a bright, sunlit urban sidewalk into a dim concrete underpass before emerging back into the daylight. It begins by passing a pink industrial building covered in black graffiti and overgrown weeds, with a massive concrete parking structure looming to the right under a clear blue sky. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts abruptly into a dark, enclosed walkway where natural light is replaced by the warm glow of a burning barrel and exposed concrete beams. The path then leads toward a distant bright exit, passing a row of colorful camping tents and a lone figure standing by a railing. Finally, the camera moves out of the shadows and back into the sunlit city environment, where palm trees and distant smoke are visible.
